all.en: Lily had always wanted to learn how to make her grandmother's famous pineapple cake.
all.zh: 莉莉一直想學她奶奶有名的鳳梨酥。

all.en: This Sunday, Mom finally agreed to teach her using the old, stained recipe card.
all.zh: 這個星期天，媽媽終於同意用那張又舊又有污漬的食譜卡教她。

all.en: "Your grandma wrote this in 1965, before I was even born," Mom said softly.
all.zh: 「妳奶奶在一九六五年寫的，那時我都還沒出生呢，」媽媽輕聲說。

all.en: Lily measured the flour carefully while Mom prepared the pineapple filling on the stove.
all.zh: 莉莉小心地量麵粉，媽媽則在爐子上準備鳳梨內餡。

all.en: The kitchen filled with the sweet, tangy smell that Lily remembered from her childhood.
all.zh: 廚房裡飄滿了那股甜中帶酸的香味，是莉莉小時候熟悉的味道。

all.en: "The trick is to stir slowly," Mom explained, taking Lily's hand to guide her movement.
all.zh: 「秘訣是要慢慢攪，」媽媽說著，握住莉莉的手引導她的動作。

all.en: Lily accidentally added too much sugar and her face turned bright red.
all.zh: 莉莉不小心放了太多糖，臉一下子漲得通紅。

all.en: Mom laughed gently and said even Grandma made mistakes when she was learning.
all.zh: 媽媽溫柔地笑了，說奶奶當年學的時候也會出錯。

all.en: They rolled the dough into small balls and pressed them into wooden molds.
all.zh: 她們把麵團搓成小球，再壓進木製模具裡。

all.en: While the cakes baked, Mom shared stories about Grandma's old bakery in Tainan.
all.zh: 烤蛋糕的同時，媽媽分享了奶奶在台南老烘焙坊的故事。

all.en: When Lily tasted the first warm cake, tears suddenly filled her eyes.
all.zh: 當莉莉嚐到第一塊熱騰騰的蛋糕時，眼淚突然湧了上來。

all.en: "It tastes just like Grandma's," she whispered, and Mom pulled her into a long hug.
all.zh: 「味道跟奶奶做的一模一樣，」她輕聲說，媽媽緊緊地抱住了她。

all.en: The next day, Lily wrapped a few pineapple cakes carefully to share with her best friend at school.
all.zh: 隔天，莉莉小心地包了幾塊鳳梨酥，要帶到學校和好朋友分享。

all.en: Her friend took one bite and immediately asked where she could buy more.
all.zh: 她朋友咬了一口，馬上問她哪裡可以買得到。

all.en: Lily proudly explained that the recipe had been in her family for more than fifty years.
all.zh: 莉莉得意地解釋說，這份食譜在她家已經傳了五十多年。

all.en: That weekend, Mom suggested they make a larger batch and visit Grandma's grave together.
all.zh: 那個週末，媽媽建議多做一批，一起去掃奶奶的墓。

all.en: They placed the cakes neatly in front of the tombstone along with fresh flowers.
all.zh: 她們把鳳梨酥整齊地擺在墓碑前，還放了新鮮的花。

all.en: Lily whispered a thank-you to her grandmother for sharing such a precious recipe.
all.zh: 莉莉輕聲向奶奶道謝，感謝她留下如此珍貴的食譜。

all.en: On the way home, Mom shared one more secret about Grandma's earlier cooking adventures.
all.zh: 回家路上，媽媽又分享了一個關於奶奶早年下廚的秘密故事。

all.en: Lily decided to keep a notebook to record every traditional recipe her mother could remember.
all.zh: 莉莉決定準備一本筆記本，記下媽媽能想起的每一道傳統食譜。

all.en: She started with the pineapple cake on the very first page, in her neatest handwriting.
all.zh: 她以最工整的字跡在第一頁先寫下鳳梨酥的食譜。

all.en: Mom watched and realized that the family's flavor would now safely pass to the next generation.
all.zh: 媽媽看著她，明白家族的味道從此能安心地傳到下一代。

all.en: Word of Lily's pineapple cakes spread quickly through her class within only a few days.
all.zh: 莉莉鳳梨酥的消息短短幾天內就在班上傳開了。

all.en: Soon, her teacher gently asked if Lily might bake some for the school's open-house event.
all.zh: 很快地，老師委婉地問莉莉能不能為學校的開放日活動烤一些。

all.en: Lily felt both honored and worried, since she had never baked such a large batch alone.
all.zh: 莉莉覺得既榮幸又擔心，因為她從來沒一個人烤過這麼大的量。

all.en: Mom promised to help her prepare and divide the work over two long weekend afternoons.
all.zh: 媽媽答應幫忙她準備，並把工作分成兩個漫長的週末午後完成。

all.en: Together they baked nearly one hundred small cakes, wrapping each one with golden ribbon.
all.zh: 她們一起烤了將近一百個小蛋糕，每一個都用金色緞帶包起來。

all.en: At the open-house event, the cakes disappeared within an hour, and several parents asked for the recipe.
all.zh: 在開放日活動上，蛋糕在一小時內就被搶光，好幾位家長還問她們食譜。

all.en: Lily politely explained that the recipe was a family secret, just like Grandma had once said.
all.zh: 莉莉禮貌地解釋這是家族秘方，就像奶奶當年所說的那樣。

all.en: The principal was so impressed that he invited her to host a baking workshop next semester.
all.zh: 校長印象深刻，邀請她下學期舉辦一場烘焙工作坊。

all.en: Lily agreed on one condition: that Mom would stand beside her to teach the traditional steps.
all.zh: 莉莉答應了一個條件：媽媽要站在她身邊，一起教傳統的步驟。

all.en: That night, Lily added a new page to her notebook, titled "How Grandma's Recipe Found New Friends."
all.zh: 那晚，莉莉在她的筆記本加了一頁新內容，標題是「奶奶的食譜如何結交新朋友」。

all.en: During the next school holiday, Lily prepared for the baking workshop she had promised to host.
all.zh: 在下個學校假期，莉莉開始為她答應主持的烘焙工作坊做準備。

all.en: Mom helped her print colorful handouts that showed each step of the pineapple cake process.
all.zh: 媽媽幫她列印彩色講義，上面清楚標示鳳梨酥的每一個製作步驟。

all.en: Twelve students from younger classes signed up, and most of them had never used wooden molds before.
all.zh: 低年級有十二位學生報名，他們大多數從沒用過木製模具。

all.en: Lily welcomed each child kindly and taught them how to weigh the flour without making a mess.
all.zh: 莉莉親切地歡迎每個孩子，教他們怎麼量麵粉才不會弄得亂七八糟。

all.en: Mom demonstrated the slow-stirring technique that Grandma had taught her many years before.
all.zh: 媽媽示範了奶奶多年前教她的慢攪秘訣。

all.en: One little boy added too much sugar, and Lily reassured him with a gentle laugh and a smile.
all.zh: 有個小男孩放了太多糖，莉莉以溫柔的笑聲和微笑安撫他。

all.en: By the end of the workshop, every student walked home holding a warm box of their own cakes.
all.zh: 工作坊結束時，每位學生都捧著一盒自己親手做的熱呼呼鳳梨酥回家。

all.en: Several parents emailed the school to thank Lily for sharing such a meaningful afternoon.
all.zh: 幾位家長寫信給學校，感謝莉莉分享了這麼有意義的一個下午。

all.en: Lily quietly added another page to her notebook, recording every funny moment from the day.
all.zh: 莉莉悄悄在筆記本再加一頁，記下當天每一個有趣的瞬間。

all.en: That night, Mom hugged her and said that Grandma would have been incredibly proud of her.
all.zh: 那晚，媽媽抱著她說，奶奶要是看到她現在的樣子一定會無比驕傲。

all.en: After the workshop's success, the school invited Lily to teach again during the following semester.
all.zh: 工作坊成功之後，學校邀請莉莉在下個學期再次開班教學。

all.en: This time, she introduced a small variation using winter melon filling for students who disliked pineapple.
all.zh: 這次她引進一個小變化，用冬瓜餡料給不喜歡鳳梨的學生選擇。

all.en: Mom suggested they design a beautiful printed cover for Lily's recipe notebook as a small gift.
all.zh: 媽媽提議幫莉莉的食譜筆記本設計一個精美的印刷封面，當作小禮物。

all.en: Lily chose a soft pink background with a hand-drawn pineapple cake in the center.
all.zh: 莉莉選了柔和的粉紅色底，中央放上手繪的鳳梨酥圖案。

all.en: Her best friend designed the title page with elegant lettering and a small portrait of Grandma.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友為扉頁設計了優雅的字體，還畫了一張奶奶的小肖像。

all.en: Lily cried softly when she saw the finished portrait, hugging her friend tightly in thanks.
all.zh: 莉莉看到完成的肖像時輕聲哭了，緊緊抱著她的朋友以表感謝。

all.en: Later that month, a local newspaper interviewed Lily about her growing baking community at school.
all.zh: 那個月稍晚，當地報紙採訪了莉莉，報導她在學校逐漸壯大的烘焙社群。

all.en: The article praised her for keeping a family tradition alive while sharing it generously with others.
all.zh: 文章稱讚她在傳承家族傳統的同時，也大方地與他人分享。

all.en: Mom framed the article and placed it on the kitchen wall beside Grandma's old recipe card.
all.zh: 媽媽把那篇報導裱框，掛在廚房牆上，就在奶奶的舊食譜卡旁邊。

all.en: Lily promised to keep baking for as long as the family kitchen could hold the sweet scent of pineapple.
all.zh: 莉莉承諾只要家中廚房還能飄著鳳梨的甜香，她就會一直烤下去。

all.en: Each Saturday, Lily welcomed new neighborhood children into her kitchen to learn the family pineapple cake.
all.zh: 每個週六，莉莉都會邀請社區裡的新孩子來廚房，學做家傳鳳梨蛋糕。

all.en: Mom helped manage the growing list of young bakers and prepared simple aprons for every visitor.
all.zh: 媽媽協助管理越來越長的小烘焙師名單，並為每位來訪者準備簡單的圍裙。

all.en: A small bakery downtown invited Lily to teach a one-day workshop during the spring school holidays.
all.zh: 市區一家小烘焙坊邀請莉莉在春假期間擔任一日工作坊的老師。

all.en: Lily was nervous at first, but Grandma's voice in her memory reminded her to bake with patience.
all.zh: 莉莉一開始很緊張，但記憶中奶奶的聲音提醒她要用耐心烘焙。

all.en: Twelve children attended the workshop, each leaving with a warm pineapple cake wrapped in soft paper.
all.zh: 工作坊有十二位孩子參加，每個人都帶走了一個用柔軟紙張包好的溫熱鳳梨蛋糕。

all.en: The bakery owner asked Lily if she would consider selling small batches of pineapple cakes weekly.
all.zh: 烘焙坊老闆問莉莉是否願意每週供應一小批鳳梨蛋糕來販售。

all.en: Lily agreed but insisted on giving a portion of every sale to a children's literacy program nearby.
all.zh: 莉莉答應了，但堅持每次銷售都要把一部分收入捐給附近的兒童閱讀計畫。

all.en: Mom helped her label each box with a tiny photo of Grandma and the original handwritten recipe card.
all.zh: 媽媽幫她在每個盒子上貼一張奶奶的小照片，並附上原本的手寫食譜卡。

all.en: Customers loved the personal story, and the small batches sold out within two hours every Saturday morning.
all.zh: 顧客很喜歡這個充滿溫度的故事，每個週六早上不到兩小時就完售。

all.en: Lily smiled at her mother and quietly thanked Grandma for a recipe that kept bringing love into the world.
all.zh: 莉莉對著媽媽微笑，靜靜感謝奶奶留下了一道不斷把愛帶進這個世界的食譜。

all.en: By the end of spring, the literacy program had received enough donations to buy three hundred new books.
all.zh: 春末時節，閱讀計畫已收到足夠的捐款，可以購買三百本新書。

all.en: The library invited Lily to speak briefly at a small ceremony celebrating the arrival of the new books.
all.zh: 圖書館邀請莉莉在慶祝新書到館的小型典禮上簡短致詞。

all.en: She shared how Grandma's recipe had quietly created a connection between baking and reading for children.
all.zh: 她分享了奶奶的食譜如何悄悄地為孩子們在烘焙與閱讀之間建立了連結。

all.en: Several librarians asked if Lily would visit local schools to read picture books while serving pineapple cake.
all.zh: 幾位圖書館員詢問莉莉是否願意到當地學校為孩子讀繪本，並一邊發送鳳梨酥。

all.en: Lily eagerly agreed and chose her favorite childhood storybook about a brave grandmother who loved baking.
all.zh: 莉莉欣然答應，並挑選了她小時候最愛的一本繪本，故事講的是一位熱愛烘焙的勇敢奶奶。

all.en: At her first school visit, the children listened with wide eyes and asked thoughtful questions afterward.
all.zh: 在她第一次到校訪問時，孩子們睜大眼睛專注聆聽，事後還提出許多深入的問題。

all.en: One little girl shyly admitted that her own grandmother also baked pineapple cake every Lunar New Year.
all.zh: 有個小女孩害羞地承認，她奶奶每到農曆新年也會烤鳳梨酥。

all.en: Lily encouraged her to write down the family recipe before any of the precious details could be forgotten.
all.zh: 莉莉鼓勵她在那些珍貴的細節被遺忘前，把家裡的食譜寫下來。

all.en: That weekend, Mom and Lily designed a free template to help families record their own baking traditions.
all.zh: 那個週末，媽媽和莉莉一起設計了一份免費的範本，幫助家庭記錄自己的烘焙傳統。

all.en: Hundreds of families downloaded the template, and Grandma's small kitchen had quietly inspired a much larger community.
all.zh: 上百個家庭下載了這份範本，奶奶那個小小的廚房悄悄啟發了一個遠比想像中更大的社群。

all.en: By early summer, the template website had collected over a thousand short family recipe stories from strangers.
all.zh: 初夏時節，範本網站已經收集了上千則來自陌生家庭的簡短食譜故事。

all.en: Lily spent each evening reading the stories aloud while Mom cooked dinner in the warm kitchen.
all.zh: 莉莉每天傍晚都在溫暖的廚房裡，一邊讓媽媽煮晚餐，一邊大聲朗讀那些故事。

all.en: A publisher emailed asking if Lily would consider compiling the best stories into a small printed book.
all.zh: 一位出版商寫信問莉莉是否願意把最棒的故事彙整成一本小型印刷書。

all.en: Lily hesitated, but Mom reminded her that sharing stories was simply another way of baking with love.
all.zh: 莉莉猶豫不決，媽媽提醒她分享故事不過是另一種以愛烘焙的方式。

all.en: Together they selected sixty heartfelt stories and arranged them by season, just as a recipe calendar might.
all.zh: 她們一起挑出六十則動人的故事，並像食譜月曆一樣按季節排列。

all.en: The book was titled Sweet Hands Across Generations, and its cover featured Grandma's original recipe card.
all.zh: 這本書取名為《代代相傳的甜蜜雙手》，封面用的是奶奶最初的手寫食譜卡。

all.en: On the launch day, the local bakery hosted a small signing event where Lily met readers in person.
all.zh: 新書發表日當天，當地烘焙坊舉辦了一場小型簽書會，莉莉親自和讀者見面。

all.en: An elderly woman cried softly as she told Lily that the book reminded her of her own late mother.
all.zh: 一位年長的女士輕聲哭著告訴莉莉，這本書讓她想起了已故的母親。

all.en: Lily hugged the woman tightly and promised to send her a fresh pineapple cake the following Saturday.
all.zh: 莉莉緊緊抱住那位女士，並答應下個星期六會寄一塊新鮮的鳳梨酥給她。

all.en: That night, Lily wrote a new entry in her notebook titled simply A Recipe Has No Final Page.
all.zh: 那晚，莉莉在她的筆記本中寫下新的一篇，標題只有一句：「一份食譜永遠沒有最後一頁」。

all.en: The next morning, Lily accidentally over-salted a batch of pineapple filling and had to throw away the entire pan with a quiet sigh.
all.zh: 隔天早上，莉莉不小心把一鍋鳳梨內餡放太多鹽，只能輕輕嘆口氣把整鍋倒掉。

all.en: Mom reminded her that even Grandma had once ruined three pans in a single afternoon during her early bakery days.
all.zh: 媽媽提醒她，奶奶當年在烘焙坊起步時，曾經一個下午連毀三鍋。

all.en: Lily decided to record every mistake in a small purple notebook, calling it her lessons from a sticky kitchen journal.
all.zh: 莉莉決定把每次失誤記在一本紫色小筆記本裡，把它取名為「黏答答廚房裡的教訓日誌」。

all.en: On Sunday afternoons, Lily started inviting elderly neighbors over to taste-test new flavor variations like longan, dragon fruit, and even guava.
all.zh: 週日下午，莉莉開始邀請年長的鄰居到家裡試吃新口味，像龍眼、火龍果，甚至芭樂。

all.en: One grandfather burst into tears when he tasted the longan version, saying it reminded him of his late wife's home cooking.
all.zh: 一位爺爺吃到龍眼口味時當場落淚，說那讓他想起已故妻子的家常味道。

all.en: Lily quietly added the longan version to the bakery's regular Saturday menu and reserved one box just for him every week.
all.zh: 莉莉默默把龍眼口味加進烘焙坊每週六的常規菜單，並每週為他保留一盒。

all.en: Her best friend designed a small wooden sign that read Grandma's Table to hang above the bakery's display window.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友設計了一塊小木牌，上面寫著「奶奶的餐桌」，掛在烘焙坊的展示窗上方。

all.en: A first-time customer asked whether the bakery sold the recipe cards, and Lily politely explained that some treasures stay inside the family.
all.zh: 一位初次上門的客人問烘焙坊有沒有賣食譜卡，莉莉客氣地解釋，有些寶物是要留在家族裡的。

all.en: Mom started keeping the original 1965 recipe card in a small wooden frame on the bakery counter, so visitors could still see Grandma's careful handwriting.
all.zh: 媽媽開始把那張一九六五年的原始食譜卡裝進小木框，放在烘焙坊櫃台上，讓客人還是能看到奶奶工整的字跡。

all.en: Before closing the bakery that night, Lily placed one warm pineapple cake beside the framed card and whispered a quiet thank-you into the still air.
all.zh: 那晚打烊前，莉莉在裱框的食譜卡旁放了一塊熱呼呼的鳳梨酥，對著靜謐的空氣輕聲說了句謝謝。

all.en: Grandma always measured the flour by hand instead of using a scale.
all.zh: 外婆總是用手抓麵粉，而不是用秤。

all.en: The secret ingredient turned out to be a tiny pinch of sea salt.
all.zh: 原來祕密的食材是一小撮海鹽。

all.en: Mom warned me not to open the oven too early or the cake would sink.
all.zh: 媽媽提醒我不要太早打開烤箱，否則蛋糕會塌下去。

all.en: We kneaded the dough until it felt soft and smooth.
all.zh: 我們揉麵團，直到它變得柔軟又光滑。

all.en: The kitchen smelled sweet and buttery within the first ten minutes.
all.zh: 不到十分鐘，廚房裡就充滿了香甜的奶油味。

all.en: I burned the first batch because I forgot to set the timer.
all.zh: 我烤壞了第一批，因為忘了設定計時器。

all.en: Mom said patience is the most important ingredient of all.
all.zh: 媽媽說，耐心才是最重要的食材。

all.en: We packed a few cakes in a box to share with the neighbors.
all.zh: 我們把幾塊蛋糕裝進盒子，要分給鄰居。

all.en: Each bite reminded me of the holidays I spent at Grandma's house.
all.zh: 每一口都讓我想起在外婆家度過的節日。

all.en: Someday, I hope to pass this recipe down to my own children.
all.zh: 總有一天，我希望能把這份食譜傳給我自己的孩子。
